title: Causal Fitness Attribution Engine — MutationAblator + CausalFitnessAttributor

invariants_introduced.description: Attribution is advisory — never overrides GovernanceGate decisions
Identical inputs produce identical attribution scores
CausalAttributionReport written to LineageLedgerV2 when ledger injected (non-blocking)

files_added: runtime/evolution/mutation_ablator.py — MutationAblator, MutationOperation, AST/field op extractors
novelty: First governance-anchored system with Shapley-approximation causal attribution of fitness gain to individual AST operations. Operations tagged CAUSAL-HIGH feed Phase 86 OperatorCoevolution and Phase 87 RoleSpecialization. Attribution is strictly advisory per CFAE-0.
